children.text: Last Sunday morning, my friends and I went to the community park to do some volunteer work.
children.cn: 上个周日早晨，我和朋友们去社区公园做了一些志愿工作。
children.notes: community: 社区；volunteer work: 志愿工作
children.statement: volunteer work 意为“志愿工作”。

children.text: It was a sunny day, and we were all excited to give a helping hand.
children.cn: 那是一个晴天，我们都很兴奋能伸出援手。
children.notes: give a helping hand: 伸出援手
children.statement: give a helping hand 意为“帮助他人”。

children.text: We worked hard to pick up trash and planted some beautiful flowers along the path.
children.cn: 我们努力工作，捡起垃圾并沿着小路种了一些漂亮的花。
children.notes: along the path: 沿着小路
children.statement: worked hard 意为“努力工作”。

children.text: Although the work was a bit tiring, the park looked much cleaner and greener afterwards.
children.cn: 虽然工作有点累，但之后公园看起来干净和绿化多了。
children.notes: although: 虽然；a bit: 有点；afterwards: 之后
children.statement: although 引导的从句与主句之间不用 but。

children.text: I felt very happy and proud because we did something good for our environment.
children.cn: 我感到非常开心和自豪，因为我们为环境做了一些好事。

children.text: I realized that helping others and caring for nature can truly make a difference.
children.cn: 我意识到帮助他人和关爱大自然确实能产生影响。
children.notes: realize: 意识到；care for: 关爱；truly: 真正地
children.highlight: that, care for, make a difference
children.statement: make a difference 是本册核心短语。

children.text: If we all do our part, we can make the world a better place.
children.cn: 如果我们都尽到自己的一份力，我们就能让世界变得更美好。
children.notes: do our part: 尽自己的一份力
children.statement: do our part 意为“尽到自己的责任/力量”。
